Dear ByteDancer,

You have a task awaiting your action in Workday. Please go to your Workday Inbox to complete the pending task "Acknowledgment of Staff Privacy Notice" at your earliest convenience.

Please click [https://sso.bytedance.com/idp/workday](
https://applink.feishu.cn/client/web_url/open?mode=window&height=1&width=1&min_width=1&max_width=1&reload=true&url=https://login.feishucn.net/oauth=eC1sYXJrLXNzbzpleU5NcjkyOGNocXdzanFzaWR1NzJ5MXAwMTI3MTJoc3FoanFiMXFvMnU4ZTJpdXdkYnNsMmk4dTIyc2pzNzN3YnhiYXNoanhraGJhc2JocWpsd2RpZXc4ZGVhb2FseHhuYWRoYWFxZDA=) to login Workday for more details.

If you have any questions, please contact HR On Call.
